markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 621. Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
##### § 621.510 — Permit Void

A permit issued under this chapter is void on the failure of the owner or the owner’s representative to comply with a rule of the board or with a condition placed on the permit by the department.

*Added by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1135 (H.B.2741), Sec. 103, eff. September 1, 2013.*

subsections.text: A permit issued under this chapter is void on the failure of the owner or the owner’s representative to comply with a rule of the board or with a condition placed on the permit by the department.
